An app helper reusing a contributed function name wins (it lands after
the contributed map in the generated Load call) and draws a warning.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0
)

replace (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper => ASSETSDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
)
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/assets.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:assets
//go:embed all:assets
var Assets embed.FS
-- web/assets/app.css --
body {}
-- web/helpers.go --
package web

//fabrik:templates:func name=asset
func CustomAsset(path string) string { return "/custom/" + path }
-- web/templates.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed all:templates
var Templates embed.FS
-- web/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html><link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ asset "app.css" }}">{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</html>
-- web/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}ok{{ end }}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Templates *templates.Set
}

//fabrik:http GET /{$}
func (h *Handlers) Home(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	h.Templates.Render(w, "home", nil)
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"

	"app/web"
)

func run() error {
	// Providers
	assetCompiled, err := assetmapper.Build([]assetmapper.Root{
		{FS: web.Assets, Dir: "assets"},
	}, nil)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	webTemplates, err := templates.Load(web.Templates, "templates", assetCompiled.FuncMap(), templates.FuncMap{
		"asset": web.CustomAsset,
	})
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
		Templates: webTemplates,
	}

	r := router.New()

	// Register
	r.Handle("/assets/", assetCompiled.Handler())
	r.Method("GET", "/{$}", webHandlers.Home)

	// Serve
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	return http.ListenAndServe(addr, r)
}
-- want/diags --
warning: web/helpers.go:3:1: template function "asset" overrides a function contributed by another directive
  help: the app helper wins; rename it to keep the contributed behavior
